(always-visible)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="220" x="760" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cc-desc" parent="cc-box" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="<b>~/.claude/memory/core-context.md</b>

Manually managed via
core-memory-update skill.

40-line cap (~2 KB).

Injected at every session
start by inject-core-context.sh
before any tool calls run." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="200" x="10" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Claude Code Session" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="200" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="t0-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="t1-box" value="memsearch Stop hook
auto-captures summary"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1-box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="SESSION TIER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="380" x="120" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1-loc" parent="t1-box" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value=".memsearch/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="360" x="10" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1-desc" parent="t1-box" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="Per-project, auto-captured. 30-day retention.
Indexed by memsearch for auto-recall at session start." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="360" x="10" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2-a" edge="1" parent="1" source="t0-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;strokeColor=#888888;" target="t2-box" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="490" y="90" /> <mxPoint x="490" y="375" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="agent writes
working notes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="110" x="500" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="t1-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="t2-box" value="memory-sync promotes
durable items (step 2)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2-box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="WORKING TIER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="380" x="120" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2-loc" parent="t2-box" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="~/.claude/memory/shared/ or agents/<name>/" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="360" x="10" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2-desc" parent="t2-box" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="Agent-curated. 90-day TTL. YAML frontmatter with tier,
created, source, expires, and tags fields.
Reviewed by memory-sync every 14 days." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="360" x="10" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="t2-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="t3-box" value="memory-sync promotes
qualifying notes (step 5)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3-box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="DISTILLED TIER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="380" x="120" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3-loc" parent="t3-box" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="context-repo/memory/distilled/" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="360" x="10" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3-desc" parent="t3-box" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="Permanent. Git-backed. Passed the "still relevant in 3 months?"
test. Deduplicated on promotion. Searchable via qmd." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="360" x="10" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="t3-box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="t4-box" value="qmd reindex (5 AM)
+ memory-sync feeds Graphiti"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4-box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="KNOWLEDGE GRAPH (Graphiti)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="380" x="120" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4-loc" parent="t4-box" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="Neo4j-backed, temporal facts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="360" x="10" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4-desc" parent="t4-box" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="search_memory_facts / search_nodes MCP tools.
Topology + relationship queries. Populated by
memory-sync and agent add_memory calls for events." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="360" x="10" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ms-box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="memory-sync pipeline (4 AM daily — 8 steps)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="160" x="560" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ms-steps" parent="ms-box" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" value="1. Scan session notes (7d)
2. Promote → working tier
3. Import LibreChat memory
4. Review notes >14d old
5. Promote → distilled tier
6. Expire stale notes (>90d)
7. Dedup check (merge)
8. Log metrics + health" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="140" x="10" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
~/.claude/memory/core-context.md
Manually managed via
core-memory-update skill.
40-line cap (~2 KB).
Injected at every session
start by inject-core-context.sh
before any tool calls run.

div.div:
Agent-curated. 90-day TTL. YAML frontmatter with tier,
created, source, expires, and tags fields.
Reviewed by memory-sync every 14 days.

div.div:
Permanent. Git-backed. Passed the "still relevant in 3 months?"
test. Deduplicated on promotion. Searchable via qmd.

div.div:
search_memory_facts / search_nodes MCP tools.
Topology + relationship queries. Populated by
memory-sync and agent add_memory calls for events.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 138px; height: 1px; padding-top: 412px; margin-left: 462px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. Scan session notes (7d)
2. Promote → working tier
3. Import LibreChat memory
4. Review notes >14d old
5. Promote → distilled tier
6. Expire stale notes (>90d)
7. Dedup check (merge)
8. Log metrics + health

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
